demographics.living_situation: at home; adult daughter present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My right side is in agony, I can't stop shaking, and I've thrown up every sip of water since lunchtime. My daughter's here with me because I can barely get out of bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started a couple of days ago with stinging when I weed, but in the last twelve hours it's gone bad fast — high fevers, violent shivering, terrible pain in my back on the right, and now I can't keep anything down.

symptom_narrative.onset: Came on over about two days. It began with burning and stinging when I passed urine, needing to go all the time, and my wee going cloudy and smelling really bad. About twelve hours ago it suddenly got much worse.
symptom_narrative.duration: Two days building up, and the severe fevers, shaking and vomiting for the last twelve hours or so.
symptom_narrative.character: A constant, deep, severe ache in my right side and back — not coming and going, just there all the time. Plus shaking chills and a burning-hot fever.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: The pain is about as bad as anything I've had, and the shaking and vomiting have completely wiped me out.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: My right side and the middle of my back on that side. There's also a bit of a dull ache low down in my tummy.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: The pain is constant. The vomiting keeps happening every time I try to sip water.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Nothing. I tried to take some paracetamol but I brought the tablets straight back up whole.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Moving around, and trying to drink — anything I swallow comes back up.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: Fevers, violent shivering/shaking, feeling sick and vomiting over and over, feeling exhausted and unwell all over, and feeling dizzy and faint when I try to stand up.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had water infections before but never anything like this.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed. I feel dizzy and weak when I stand, so my daughter has to help me to the bathroom.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurrent urinary/water infections in the past

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol (tried today for the fever but vomited it back up)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives at home; adult daughter is present and anxious about how quickly her mother is deteriorating.

objective_data_offered.value: Daughter says mum looks pale and clammy, is shivering and shaking, and is too weak and dizzy to get out of bed without help.
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: Family member's visual impression over the phone, not a clinician assessment.

objective_data_offered.value: Has vomited every sip of water since lunchtime and brought her paracetamol tablets back up whole.
Her wee has been cloudy and smelling really bad for the last couple of days.
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: Patient's own description of urine appearance; no dipstick or laboratory test done.

objective_data_offered.value: Feels very dizzy and faint whenever she sits up or stands.
